body:
If both dt and component dts are passed in, the component dts are chosen, and a warning is shown.
Ff the coupler dt is not divisible by a component dt, an error is thrown with a message identifying the component dt which the coupler dt is not a multiple of.

The usage of the SciMLBase `step!` function did not need to be modified because all the component models call `step!` like the following

```
Interfacer.step!(sim::ClimaAtmosSimulation, t) = Interfacer.step!(sim.integrator, t - sim.integrator.t, true)
```

The SciMLBase [docs](https://docs.sciml.ai/DiffEqDocs/stable/basics/integrator/) say 
"passing a dt will make the integrator continue to step until at least integrator.t+dt, and passing true as the third argument will add a tstop to force it to step up to integrator.t+dt, exactly".

I also ran it interactively with the config for the component dts experiment, and all of the components with integrators end with the proper `t`. 
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Closes #1017 


## To-do
- [x] Add an experiment 


## Content
- add component dts as optional arguments to `cli_options.jl`
- make `run_amip.jl` support component dts or a general dt

title: Add specific component dt's to cli_options and parse
